list.label: Agência
list.name: host
list.query: SELECT ht.value AS __text, h.host AS __value FROM host_tag ht JOIN hosts h ON ht.hostid=h.hostid JOIN hosts_groups hg ON h.hostid=hg.hostid JOIN hstgrp g ON hg.groupid=g.groupid WHERE ht.tag='unidade_negocio' AND g.name='HG_AGENCIAS_ROUTERS' ORDER BY __text

list.label: Interface
list.name: iface
list.query: SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(i.name,'Interface ',-1),': Operational status',1) AS __text, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(i.name,'(',1),'Interface ',-1) AS __value FROM items i JOIN hosts h ON i.hostid=h.hostid WHERE h.host='$host' AND i.name LIKE 'Interface %: Operational status' AND i.flags=4 AND i.status=0 ORDER BY __text
